snippet.title: Real Asset Investing Principles From a $725 BILLION CEO
snippet.description:
Real Asset Investing Principles From a $725 BILLION CEO // Brookfield Asset Management came in at #2 in the 2022 PERE 100 list, which ranks real estate investment management firms based on the amount of institutional capital raised over the last 5 years.

Brookfield is an absolute powerhouse in the real estate industry, with $725 billion in assets under management and over $250 billion in their real estate division alone, with over 500 million square feet of commercial space in their portfolio.

And at the head of the company is a CEO by the name of Bruce Flatt, who has led the firm since 2002 and is often referred to as “Canada’s Warren Buffett”, based on his own value investing strategies.

And recently, Flatt has taken the time in several different public presentations and interviews to share some of the principles that have made Brookfield so successful over the years, talking through the methodology and framework the company uses to evaluate new deals.

So to help you tap into some of the wisdom that has turned Brookfield into a trusted advisor of hundreds of billions of dollars of investor capital, in this video, let’s walk through three of Flatt’s most impactful real asset investing principles, and how you can use these same principles to make smarter investment decisions and to advance your career in the real estate industry.

snippet.title: Weathering Inflation w/ Bruce Flatt, CEO, Brookfield Asset Management & Lubna Bouza - #FII6 - Day 2
snippet.description:
IN CONVERSATION: WEATHERING INFLATION I Future Investment Initiative 6th Edition

Inflation has become a global crisis. Consumer prices in June increased from 2021 by 9.1% in the U.S., and 9.6% in the E.U. And the factors fueling inflationary forces have carried across the world. In the U.S., worldwide supply crunches have failed to catch up to increased American consumer demand post-pandemic, raising prices. In Europe, diminished energy supplies have sent shockwaves across the economy. What are the factors contributing to global runaway inflation, and what do these pressures mean for the road ahead?

SPEAKER
● Bruce Flatt, CEO, Brookfield Asset Management MODERATOR
● Lubna Bouza, Editor In Chief, Skynews Arabia

David Rubenstein, the founder of Carlyle Group, one of the largest investment firms managing over $300 billion, says he was skeptical of crypto but now believes that “the genie is out of the bottle” and the crypto industry is not “going to go away anytime soon.”
◦
- The Basics of Bitcoins and Blockchains: An Introduction to Cryptocurrencies and the Technology That Powers Them (Cryptography, Derivatives Investments, Futures Trading, Digital Assets, Nft) https://amzn.to/3uwEbh9

- Crypto Investing Guide: How to Invest in Bitcoin, DeFi, NFTs, and More (English Edition) https://amzn.to/3LUutuL
Thank you for watching! WE APPRECIATE EACH ONE OF YOU!
◦
►Don't forget to Subscribe to our Channel to get some more Crypto News! :)
◦

snippet.title: 5 sectores en los que Bruce Flatt recomienda invertir + Las características de los mejores negocios
snippet.description:
Te muestro los consejos de inversión de Bruce Flatt ("el Warren Buffett de Canadá"), es el mejor gestor de activos del mundo y ha conseguido rentabilidades anualizadas del 15,5% durante más de 19 años como CEO de Brookfield Asset Management.

La principal diferencia entre Bruce Flatt y el resto de inversores es que Bruce invierte para hacerse el control de las compañías y hace los cambios necesarios en ellas para lograr grandes rentabilidades (otros inversores como Warren Buffett compran participaciones minoritarias en una compañía y no interfieren en la operativa).

En este vídeo te traigo la siguiente información redactada por el mismo Bruce Flatt: en qué sectores deberías invertir para no perder dinero, cuáles son las 6 cualidades que tienen los mejores negocios y qué preguntas deberías hacerte antes de invertir en una empresa. Junto con la información anterior verás ejemplos prácticos de acciones que cumplen cada una de las 6 cualidades de un buen negocio.

Por otra parte, te analizo la cartera de unos de los mejores inversores value del mundo y discípulo de Warren Buffett: Seth Klarman. Este superinversor ha conseguido rentabilidades anualizadas del 20% durante más de 34 años. Al analizar su cartera de inversión te descubro una tendencia de inversión bastante interesante.

También encontrarás en este vídeo un nuevo caso práctico de trampa de valor y como siempre te analizo las acciones que me habéis pedido en los comentarios.

snippet.title: The Art of Investing
snippet.description:
David Rubenstein, co founder and co chairman of The Carlyle Group, one of the world’s largest private investment  firms, discusses his perspectives on the investing world, and the insights recently  gained from interviewing a number of the country’s best investors for his new book How To Invest—Masters of the Craft.

This conversation was part of the 2022 Aspen Ideas Festival.

Speakers: 
David Rubenstein, Co-Founder and Co-Chairman, The Carlyle Group

Now in its 18th year, the Aspen Ideas Festival is the Aspen Institute’s signature summer public event. Among the key themes explored at this year’s festival are conversations around the concepts of Heat, Power, Connection, Trust, Money, and Beauty.

From June 25-July 1, 2022 more than 300 leaders and innovators gather in the Rocky Mountains to engage in deep and inquisitive discussion of the issues that shape our lives and challenge our times, spanning politics, business, science, the arts, education, and more. #AspenIdeas

snippet.title: KKR's Co-CEO's Nuttall, Bae Chart Their Own Path: Front Row
snippet.description: Global investment firm KKR is setting itself apart once again with the announcement of co-CEOs. Scott Nuttall and Joseph Bae have the reins of a company which boasts about $500 billion in assets and a history of doing things a little differently. As inflation and a monetary tightening cycle approach, these CEOs of CEOs must chart a path in tandem. Nuttall and Bae are looking to make their own impact while remaining true to the values of founders Jerome Kolhberg, Jr., Henry Kravis and George Roberts. Scott Nuttall and Joseph Bae spoke exclusively with Jason Kelly on Bloomberg's "Front Row."

localized.title: India Continues To Be In A Soaring Bull Market | Ridham Desai, Morgan Stanley | ET Now
localized.description:
Speaking to ET NOW, Ridham Desai stated that foreign selling has happened across the EM cohort and that valuations continue to look very attractive for China. He also added that India has done very well and has given up 600 bps since the RBI rate hike. "India continues to be in a soaring bull market. In the midst of a new growth cycle, 20%+ profit across any cohort in the market, he asserted. So what are the top themes to ride the volatility? Will inflation play spoilsport? Watch this interview on ET NOW to find out.
